stem: From 2010 through 2020, the number of vinyl records sold annually in a country grew each year by approximately 12% of the number sold the preceding year. In 2010, approximately 250 thousand vinyl records were sold in the country. Of the following, which best models V, the number of thousands of vinyl records sold in the country, t years after 2010?
rationale: Choice C is correct. A quantity that grows by r% per time period t is modeled by an exponential equation of the form V = I(1 + r/100)t, where I is the initial value. Here I = 250 and r = 12, giving V = 250(1.12)t. Choice A misrepresents the growth rate. Choice B models a decline. Choice D would represent an 88% annual growth rate.
